subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thou has asked regarding the phrase "He is God!" written above the Tablets. By this Word is intended that no one hath any access
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان در خصوص عنوان هوالله بر مکاتیب مرقوم نموده بودید از این کلمه
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @station of the Manifestation of God
